title: Secret Update
description: JSON Schema for the Infisical secret update operation.

workspaceId.description: The ID of the project to update the secret in.

projectSlug.description: The slug of the project to update the secret in.

environment.description: The slug of the environment where the secret is located.

secretValue.description: The new value of the secret.

secretPath.description: The default path for secrets to update or upsert, if not provided in the secret details.

skipMultilineEncoding.description: Skip multiline encoding for the secret value.

type.description: The type of the secret to update.

tagIds.description: The ID of the tags to be attached to the updated secret.

secretReminderNote.description: Note to be attached in notification email.

secretReminderRepeatDays.description: Interval for secret rotation notifications, measured in days.

secretReminderRecipients.description: An array of user IDs that will receive the reminder email. If not specified, all project members will receive the reminder email.

newSecretName.description: The new name for the secret.
